description:
Document to reference a collection (e.g. file or group of files) of
externally-stored data streams

data_key.description: A string to show which data_key of the Descriptor are being streamed
data_key.title: Data Key

parameters.description: Additional keyword arguments to pass to the Handler to read a Stream Resource
parameters.title: Parameters

run_start.description: Globally unique ID to the run_start document this Stream Resource is associated with.
run_start.title: Run Start

mimetype.description: String identifying the format/type of this Stream Resource, used to identify a compatible Handler
mimetype.title: Mimetype

uid.description: Globally unique identifier for this Stream Resource
uid.title: Uid

title: StreamResource
